title: I Love Watching Savings Grow
subtitle: An affirmation for building genuine enthusiasm about saving
excerpt: A short affirmation for building a positive relationship with savings. Rather than gritting through the act of setting money aside, this affirmation cultivates the satisfaction that comes from watching a balance climb over time.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 52 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation for turning a savings check into something you look forward to. The habit of watching savings grow, rather than avoiding that account, builds a consistent relationship with money that compounds over time.
The affirmation names satisfaction in the watching: not the money itself, but the act of observing steady accumulation. This is a statement about relationship with saving, not just with wealth.
I love watching my savings grow. I save with ease. Each pound I put away is proof that I trust myself.
Say it out loud three times when you open your savings account. Let the number on the screen be the concrete anchor for the affirmation. Repeat monthly when the balance updates.
Adapted from Day 52 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
